# DATPAQ Current Time API Sample

This repository contains a production-ready single-page application demonstrating the DATPAQ Current Time API.

## Primary resources
- Human docs: https://datpaq.com/api/v1/current-time
- API base URL: https://datpaq.com/api
- API route used by this sample: /v1/current-time
- OpenAI metadata (machine-readable): /openai.json

## What this app demonstrates
- Current time lookup by IANA timezone (`America/New_York`).
- Current time lookup by comma-separated target (`America, Arizona`).
- Required request validation for API key and target.
- Loading, error, empty, and success state rendering.
- Copyable request URL and JSON response output.

## Auth expectations
- Requires an API key in the `x-api-key` request header.

## Query contract (GET /v1/current-time)
- Required: `target`

## Output contract
- Typical successful response includes:
  - `requested_location`
  - `datetime`
  - `timezone_name`
  - `timezone_abbreviation`
  - `gmt_offset`
  - `is_dst`
  - `latitude` and `longitude`
